channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Chiefs' Harrison Butker visits Trump at White House after Super Bowl loss
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs' three-time Super Bowl champion Harrison Butker dropped by the White House to visit President Donald Trump on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: what to know before you go
item.description: San Diego FC (SDFC) is expected to make history this Saturday, March 1, as the club hosts its inaugural home opener at Snapdragon Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Japanese artist Murakami lends artwork to exclusive MLB collaboration ahead of Tokyo Series
item.description: Takashi Murakami’s artwork has graced luxury goods from top fashion houses and album covers of superstar musicians.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Verstappen and Norris 'respect' each other while joking about their F1 rivalry
item.description: Max Verstappen and Lando Norris have dismissed suggestions their Formula 1 rivalry has turned into a personal feud.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Norway is voting on whether to scrap VAR. The wider soccer world is watching with interest
item.description: Norwegian soccer will vote this weekend on whether to scrap the use of video reviews in its top league after a turbulent couple of years since the technology was introduced.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Championship bound! Acalanes girls dice up Cardinal Newman in NCS Open semifinal
item.description: NCS Open Division girls basketball playoffs: K.K. Lacanlale scores 13 points, dishes out 10 assists as Acalanes cruises past Cardinal Newman.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: BYU drains 17 three-pointers in 91-81 win over ASU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 26 points, Trevin Knell added 18 and No. 25 BYU beat short-handed Arizona State 91-81 on Wednesday night to extend its winning streak to five games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: RSL eliminated from Champions Cub with 2-1 loss
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake failed to advance to the Round of 16 of the 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a 2-1 home loss against CS Herediano on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NASCAR stars enjoy immersive Mexico City visit ahead of first international Cup Series race
item.description: Daniel Suarez led a quartet of NASCAR stars through the streets of Mexico City in search of a nightcap following a full day of showcasing his native country to his fellow competitors.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Japan beats United States 2-1 for SheBelieves Cup women's soccer title
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Toko Koga scored early in the second half and Japan handed the United States its first loss under coach Emma Hayes with a 2-1 victory Wednesday night in the SheBelieves Cup title game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz lose to Kings on Kessler's big night, 118-101
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Despite a season-high 25 points and 14 points from Walker Kessler, the Utah Jazz lost to the Sacramento Kings Wednesday night at the Delta Center, 118-101. Keegan Murray scored a season-high 26 points and Zach Levine added 22 to lift the hot-shooting Kings.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Holloman from halfcourt! Buzzer-beater gives No. 8 Michigan State a 58-55 win over No. 16 Maryland
item.description: COLLEGE PARK, Md. (AP) — Tre Holloman made a buzzer-beater from beyond midcourt to give No. 8 Michigan State a 58-55 win over No. 16 Maryland in a sensational finish Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Riley Gaines sends warning to Democrats, NCAA during national battle over trans athletes in women's sports
item.description: Former NCAA swimmer and OutKick host Riley Gaines warned Democrats and the NCAA Wednesday about multiple conflicts involving transgender athletes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFLPA Survey: Matt Eberflus rated worst head coach in 2024
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The NFL Players Association released the results of their annual players survey Wednesday at the NFL Scouting Combine.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Super Bowl reporter found dead in hotel room had sedative drug in his system, police say
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The television reporter who died in New Orleans while on assignment to cover the Super Bowl had a sedative drug in his system, a police detective testified in court this week.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lando Norris is fastest and Lewis Hamilton 13th as a power cut disrupts F1 testing
item.description: SAKHIR, Bahrain (AP) — Lando Norris was fastest and seven-time champion Lewis Hamilton 13th as Formula 1 teams had to deal with a power outage that disrupted preseason testing Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vanderbilt guard Mikayla Blakes eager to grow thanks to attention from her record-setting play
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Vanderbilt freshman Mikayla Blakes knows each time she drops the ball in the basket it will bring more attention. That's what happens when someone scores 53 points, then sets the NCAA freshman single-game scoring record with 55 just 17 days later.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah wins another tight 2-1 game over Chicago
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is learning how to finish games just in time for a playoff push. Lawson Crouse scored the game-winning goal with 7:48 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 2-1 at Delta Center on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Softball: Christian 5, El Capitan 3
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Spring sports underway with Christian beating El Capitan on Monday afternoon 5-3. Patriots were lead by Ava Barrios, Long Beach State commit was dominate in the circle going five innings with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Handwritten love letter from Michael Jordan's high school days hits auction
item.description: A series of rare Michael Jordan items, including a holy grail autographed basketball card and a handwritten love letter, are being auctioned at Leland's Auctions in New York.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: University of Utah fires head basketball coach Craig Smith
item.description: The University of Utah has fired the head coach of its men's basketball program, Craig Smith. Assistant coach Josh Eilert will take over for the remainder of the season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: RSL gets shut out in MLS season opener by San Jose
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - From San Jose, Costa Rica to San Jose, California, Real Salt Lake has not been able to score a goal in this early part of the 2025 season. After a scoreless draw in the CONCACAF Champions Cup opener against C.S.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State sweeps San Diego State, 79-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For just the second time first since joining the Mountain West Conference, Utah State sweeps San Diego State. Dexter Akanno scored a career-high 26 points, making 7-of-9 three-pointers to lead the Aggies to a 79-71 win over the Aztecs Saturday night at The Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Mission Bay 44, Torrey Pines 42
item.description: A big time matchup in boys open division quarters with a #4 and #5 seed matchup, Torrey Pines and Mission Bay.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: One-armed basketball player makes history with basket
item.description: When her high school basketball coach cut her from the team senior year, Baileigh Sinaman-Daniel refused to let that rejection, or the fact she was born with one arm, end her dream.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Singer of Canadian anthem at 4 Nations Face-Off changes lyric to protest Trump's 51st state remarks
item.description: The anthem singer who performed the Canadian anthem prior to the 4 Nations Face-Off championship game Thursday night changed a lyric in “O Canada” as a response to U.S. President Donald Trump's repeated remarks about making the country the 51st state.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO and KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Connor McDavid scores in OT to give Canada 3-2 win over United States in 4 Nations Face-Off final
item.description: Instead, the Canadian team stood at the blue line, arm in arm, player and coach, wearing their championship hats while the maple leaf flag was lowered behind the 4 Nations Face-Off trophy and the national anthem reverberated across the Americans' home ice.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama to miss remainder of season after blood clot diagnosis
item.description: San Antonio star Victor Wembanyama's season is over after he was diagnosed with a blood clot in his right shoulder, a condition that will sideline one of the league's brightest stars and is the second massive health-related hit for the Spurs in a matter of months.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4
